name: Demo of the Best Social Media Management Platform: Synup Social
episode_summary: Did you know that 54% of consumers say that interacting with brands on social media informs their purchasing decisions? That's why we created Synup Social - a revolutionary new social media management platform that prioritizes content creation and engagement.
episode_summary_rich_text:
Our AI-assisted post generator inspires you with ideas and helps you write them in your brand's signature voice. Content that once took you hours to trend-research and write now can be done in minutes. Here's what else we love:

-We highlight and remix your best posts - so you can give your audience more of their favorite content

-Use AI to reinvent trends to match your brand identity and voice

-Revolutionary analytics dashboard shows your best posts and engagement score at-a-glance

-Funnel content into an approval workflow - so your content gets seen, approved, and published without posts slipping through the cracks

-We streamlined reporting; screenshot or export your analytics for a full-scope review of your performance.

-Integrated with our local product - so you can post to local feeds like your Google Business Profile, all with one click
episode_transcript:
Let’s take a look at the top features and benefits of Synup Social

Do you wish you had a social media management tool that has social media posts ready for you to publish, daily? A platform that guides you through tasks that need your immediate attention? Take a look at the Synup Social dashboard.

It’s easy to stay on track of your posting schedule and engagement goals by seeing an overview of your stats. Set your weekly post target and check your post calendar at-a-glance. You can also see your engagement score, which is generated by self-directed engagement benchmarks for likes, comments, shares, and clicks.

Do you spend hours researching ideas and topics for social media posts that are relevant to your brand? Let’s get inspired with Synup Social

The content ideas section features trending content in your niche, event-centric post ideas, and even repost recommendations for your best-performing posts. Clicking on any of the ideas will take you straight to our revolutionary post creator, where you can use AI to remix the ideas with your brand voice.

For more inspiration, head to the Ideas tab. Here, you’ll see AI-generated posts that are ready to publish. The more you use Synup Social, the more our AI will learn your copy writing style! Scrolling down, you can get inspired by seeing what’s trending for brand-specific hashtags, relevant business categories, or even sneak a peek at what your competitors are doing.

Check out even more great ideas inspired by special days of the year (like national hot chocolate day) or month-long observances (like women’s history month). Our AI will generate a brand-specific post within seconds.

Our AI makes it possible to create trendy, engaging posts in a fraction of the time. It’s easier than ever to create and schedule posts across platforms - with or without AI assistance.

Is it hard for you to stay compliant with ever-changing social network sites policies? How are you differentiating content between platforms?

Synup social lets you create a social media post in a single screen and publish it across multiple social sites. You can also create different variations of the same post for each social network site. Naturally, you are catering to different types of audiences. 

Easily view and create posts from a calendar, feed, or list view. When creating a post, you can collaborate with teammates with our unique approval workflow and even create local posts with one click! We’ll even suggest the best time to post to maximize engagement.

Do you track your brand’s social media performance across all social network sites in one place? Do you have trouble getting meaningful insights from your results?

Our interactive analytics dashboard is designed to track and improve your engagement. Track your metrics by platform, and view valuable insights into which posts are actually driving engagement, so that you can create more such posts. Not only that, you can easily understand trends such as impressions that your posts are gathering, if the followers counts is increasing or declining, and of course a downloadable report to share with your team!

‍

Leave the engagement and post creation to us!

seo.title: Demo of the Best Social Media Management Platform: Synup Social
